parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value:
=Create an engaging 60-90 second short story script about: {{ $json.topic }}

Requirements:
- Hook viewers in first 3 seconds
- Tell complete story with beginning, middle, end
- Keep it suspenseful and emotional
- Use vivid descriptions
- End with a powerful conclusion
- Write ONLY the narration script, no stage directions
- Format: Just the story text, nothing else

Script:
